title: Windows Update message cleanup
description: Strips the redundant '<Task> == <Level>:' prefix and the trailing ' | ' from WUTraceLogging (Windows Update) trace messages. The task is already in the TaskName column and the level in Level, so echoing them in the message is just noise. Requires field-extraction enrichment to be enabled.

sections.name: WuMessageCleanup
sections.description: Remove the task/level echo and trailing pipe that WU trace lines duplicate from their columns
